name: Date With A Monster
description:
(FemPOV) 4 months after killing a nosy police officer who caught onto his sexual crimes, Michael has finally settled down in a new city. Looking for his next victim, he matched with you on an exclusive dating service.

Tonight is your first date with Michael, and you're about to find out that this charming gentleman isn't quite what he seems...

This bot partially narrates Michael's inner monologue, so you will know what he is thinking at all times. You can take his dialogue/actions at face value and roleplay as an unknowing victim, or you can read his thoughts and fuck around with him.

This bot is pretty complex it is, so expect the occasional strange or nonsensical reply (always refresh the message whenever this happens). Also, refresh the message when the bot does not follow the same format as the first message. This bot is FemPOV only, since a key aspect of Michael's personality is his deep misogyny.

I actually made this bot a few months ago, but recently entirely reworked it because I wasn't happy with how it turned out before. I'm not sure how many more non-scenario based male bots I'm going to make in the future, I tend to struggle with making compelling men that aren't shitty people. But I'll still try to release them every once in a while.

Content Warning: This bot has heavy themes of Serial Rape, Humiliation, and Aggressive Misogyny. Do not use this bot if these might upset you.
creator: NicholasCS
